login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to manage your operations
login.forgotPasswordDesc: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
login.resetSentDesc: Check your email for a link to reset your password. If it doesn't appear within a few minutes, check your spam folder.
login.error.unauthorizedDomain: This domain is not authorized for sign-in. Contact support.
login.error.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
register.title: Get started
register.subtitle: Create your account and start running your operation.
register.signingUpSubtitle: Hold tight — setting up your account.
register.popupBlocked: Popup blocked — allow popups for this site to sign up.
register.error.weakPassword: Password must be at least 6 characters
register.error.emailExists: An account already exists with this email
register.error.passwordWeak: Password is too weak. Use at least 6 characters.
pin.title: Enter PIN
pin.cleared: PIN cleared. Please set a new PIN in Settings.
lockout.shared.cooldownNote: You can request again in 24 hours.
lockout.shared.noAdminsBody: Contact OPS support to restore access.
lockout.expiredAdmin.heading: SUBSCRIPTION LAPSED
lockout.expiredAdmin.body: Your team's subscription ended. Pick a plan below to bring your crew back online.
lockout.expiredAdmin.bodyWithDate: Your team's subscription ended on {{date}}. Pick a plan below to bring your crew back online.
lockout.expiredMember.heading: SUBSCRIPTION LAPSED
lockout.expiredMember.body: Your team's subscription ended. Only an admin can turn it back on.
lockout.expiredMember.explainer: Your admins will get a notification. They can reactivate from settings.
lockout.unseatedAdmin.heading: NO SEAT ASSIGNED
lockout.unseatedAdmin.body: You don't have a seat in this company. Add yourself from the team page.
lockout.unseatedAdmin.explainer: Owners and admins can give themselves a seat from the team page.
lockout.unseatedMember.heading: NO SEAT ASSIGNED
lockout.unseatedMember.body: Your admin needs to give you a seat before you can use OPS.
lockout.unseatedMember.explainer: Your admin will get a notification to add you from the team page.
lockout.pricing.subscribeFailed.title: Checkout unavailable
